name: chemag-reference-monorepo
description: Demo monorepo exercising chemag end-to-end (TypeScript web + worker, Python FastAPI). Used by benchmarks, screenshots, and integration tests.

scripts.chemag:check: chemag check workspace.yaml && chemag check --workspace apps/api/workspace.yaml
scripts.chemag:analyze: chemag analyze workspace.yaml && chemag analyze --workspace apps/api/workspace.yaml
